description_long: This is a vibrant red ceramic cup with a flared base and a smoothly curved body. The front features a prominent white cross, reminiscent of the Swiss flag, and the word 'SWITZERLAND' is printed in bold white letters along the inner rim. The cup has a sturdy, rounded handle attached to one side, designed for comfortable gripping. The interior is glossy white, contrasting with the bright red exterior. Accompanying the cup is a dark gray spoon with a slightly curved handle and a matte finish, suggesting it is made of metal or plastic.
description: A red ceramic cup with a white cross and 'SWITZERLAND' text, featuring a rounded handle and a matching dark gray spoon.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white cross emblem, 'SWITZERLAND' text, and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the cup's smooth red surface, with the spoon placed horizontally.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the handle on the left and the plain red back of the cup, with the spoon in the foreground.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the handle and a partial view of the cross, with the spoon extending behind the cup.
